name: Assassination of Kazem Rajavi
description: On 24 April 1990, [Kazem Rajavi](/people/kazem-rajavi) — professor of political science at the University of Geneva, human rights advocate, and elder brother of MEK leader [Massoud Rajavi](/people/massoud-rajavi) — was assassinated near his home in Coppet, Switzerland. He was shot at close range by multiple [Iranian intelligence](/orgs/ministry-of-intelligence) agents who had entered Switzerland on diplomatic passports. [Ali Fallahian](/people/ali-fallahian), then intelligence minister under [Akbar Hashemi Rafsanjani](/people/akbar-hashemi-rafsanjani), was charged by a Swiss court with masterminding the operation. In 2020, the Swiss case was reopened to be investigated as a crime against humanity.
editorial_notes: Part of a broader pattern of extraterritorial assassinations alongside the Mykonos and chain murders.
